expected_behavior: When the cart is empty, the Checkout action should be disabled or should show an error and must not create/charge an order.
observed_behavior: After checking out once and seeing the cart read empty, pressing Checkout again was allowed and an order with a charge ($12.50) is shown despite no items in the cart.
reproduction_steps: Click 'Add to cart' on a product (e.g., Blue Shockproof Phone Case).
Without adding any new items, click 'Checkout' again while the cart reads 'Your cart is empty.'
Observe that an order with a charge is shown even though the cart is empty (checkout was allowed).
title: Checkout processes and charges even when the cart is empty
